noteText: Opening route is clean, but camera check is late before crossing mid.
Good pause before re-peeking. Keep this timing when utility is still available.
Overcommitted after first contact instead of resetting behind cover.
Crosshair placement drifts low during the rotate. Keep it at head height through corners.
Strong trade setup with teammate, but spacing is slightly too close.
End sequence is rushed. Take the extra second to isolate the final angle.
